2026-04-06.kind: Custom IAM roles permission update for Gemini Cloud Assist
2026-04-06.content:
On April 8, 2026, Gemini Cloud Assist is replacing the
`cloudaicompanion.instances.completeTask` IAM permission with
`geminicloudassist.agents.invoke`. Updates to standard IAM roles will be done
automatically, but if you have access to Gemini Cloud Assist through a custom
IAM role, you must update the role before April 8, 2026 to ensure continued
access. For more information, see the
[deprecated IAM permissions](https://docs.cloud.google.com/cloud-assist/deprecations/permissions)
page.

summary.title: Gemini Cloud Assist IAM Permission Update
summary.summary: Gemini Cloud Assist is updating its IAM permissions on April 8, 2026. Custom IAM roles will require an update from `cloudaicompanion.instances.completeTask` to `geminicloudassist.agents.invoke` to maintain access. Standard roles will be updated automatically.

2026-01-01.content:
Gemini Cloud Assist release notes are now published here. If you are
looking for Gemini Cloud Assist release notes prior to January 2026,
see the [Gemini for Google Cloud release notes](https://docs.cloud.google.com/gemini/docs/release-notes).

summary.title: Gemini Cloud Assist Documentation Now Available
summary.summary: Gemini Cloud Assist release notes are now published in this location. For release notes prior to January 2026, please refer to the Gemini for Google Cloud release notes.
